creator: swear@aa.net
text:
Boot prompt "?" command doesn't list "boot-conf" command but accepts it
as a command.
================

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
Boot the OS normally and at the boot prompt type "?" and obverve no
entry for "boot-conf".  I don't remember for sure, but I think you
enter "unload" and then "boot-conf" and it boots normally.  It's
described in the handbook.
================
